test: Governance plus controls vs controls for next-year general FDI
result: Incremental MAE improvement=-0.0067; country-cluster bootstrap 95% CI -0.0301 to 0.0160; P(improvement)=0.291
interpretation: No reliable predictive gain. General FDI is rejected as the success target for this governance layer.
Strong shared governance signal and high collinearity; this supports parsimonious aggregation but not unidimensionality or causal attribution.
